title: Rework overlay pkg for use with libpod
body:
Podman uses the overlay mounts differently then in buildah.  Specifically the
overlay mount points can be used over and over again when starting and stopping
the container.  Since the paths are backed into the contianer config, we have
to be able to cleanout just the Upper and Merged directory rather then destroying
and recreating the overlay directories on each container start.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg I have all of the tests in the PODMAN PR as well as existing buildah tests for overlay mounts.
LGTM will let @vrothberg merge this when he thinks the libpod dance is complete.
Feel free to merge once containers/libpod#3457 is green. But I'd love to see containers/libpod#3457 being green :^)
I am failing to get the go mod dance to work.  The latest version of runc/libcontainer is forcing an older version  of dbus and coreos/systemd-dbus which is blocking the compilation in libpod.
@rhatdan can you re-dance with the scripts from https://github.com/vrothberg/go-mod-helpers? I'd expect go 1.13 to do a better job.
@rhatdan, did you finish the dance requested by @vrothberg for this?
No not yet,  now that @mheon volume patch has been merged, I can get back to it and look at how I can get to use this code.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Will get back to this soon.  I have PRs working in CS and pids-limit, then back to this one.

I am going to merge this so I can finally get overlay support into libpod.
@rh-atomic-bot r=vrothberg

:pushpin: Commit 0629c78 has been approved by `vrothberg`
